originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&xGridSpacing` is never used.

model:
(define-fun AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID () Bool
  false)
(define-fun ENABLE_AUTO_BED_LEVELING () Bool
  true)
reasoning: PC is infeasible: In e30bfedce4d.c, ENABLE_AUTO_BED_LEVELING=T causes '#define AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID' at L2, yet PC requires AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID=F — direct contradiction. Configuration cannot exist. Classification: FALSE.
